'''hangufu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:sabadinine|sabadinine]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-ng-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sabadinine|sabadinine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| hangufu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hængifith|hængifith]] || [[word:hængifij|hængifij]] || [[word:hængifish|hængifish]] || [[word:hængifi|hængifi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hangungufuth|hangungufuth]] || [[word:hangungufuj|hangungufuj]] || [[word:hangungufush|hangungufush]] || [[word:hangungufu|hangungufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hangufuth|hangufuth]] || [[word:hangufuj|hangufuj]] || [[word:hangufush|hangufush]] || [[word:hangufu|hangufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hanguffuth|hanguffuth]] || [[word:hanguffuj|hanguffuj]] || [[word:hanguffush|hanguffush]] || [[word:hanguffuf|hanguffuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hangufuthu|hangufuthu]] || [[word:hangufuju|hangufuju]] || [[word:hangufushu|hangufushu]] || [[word:hangufuku|hangufuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hangufuth|hangufuth]] || [[word:hangufuj|hangufuj]] || [[word:hangufush|hangufush]] || [[word:hangufu|hangufu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hangufuthul|hangufuthul]] || [[word:hangufujul|hangufujul]] || [[word:hangufushul|hangufushul]] || [[word:hangufukul|hangufukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hangufuthuthu|hangufuthuthu]] || [[word:hangufujuju|hangufujuju]] || [[word:hangufushushu|hangufushushu]] || [[word:hangufuku|hangufuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hangufuthun|hangufuthun]] || [[word:hangufujun|hangufujun]] || [[word:hangufushun|hangufushun]] || [[word:hangufukun|hangufukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hangufuthuoro|hangufuthuoro]] || [[word:hangufujuoro|hangufujuoro]] || [[word:hangufushuoro|hangufushuoro]] || [[word:hangufukuoro|hangufukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
